mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT permission.permission_code FROM pinova.admin_account_role account_role JOIN pinova.admin_role role ON role.id = account_role.role_id AND role.deleted = false JOIN pinova.admin_role_permission role_permission ON role_permission.role_id = role.id JOIN pinova.admin_permission permission ON permission.id = role_permission.permission_id AND permission.deleted = false WHERE account_role.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY permission.permission_code
